tweets.name: Byreal
tweets.content:
Byreal has no exposure to Drift Protocol. Byreal users are not affected.

We take operational security seriously and have risk controls in place to proactively identify and fix vulnerabilities. No single admin key can list assets on, or modify our protocol.

As a CLMM DEX, we do not have vaults and lending pools. Our smart contracts are monitored in real time to identify and prevent exploits.

Our heart goes out to those affected. We wish the Drift team and their users the best as they work towards a resolution.

tweets.name: Jupiter
tweets.content:
At Jupiter, our focus remains on safety above all else.

And while the protocol is open sourced, audited 7x, and formally verified, code controls are only one layer.

That's why we wanted to give you full transparency into Jupiter Lend's operational security as well.

Here's what's in place:

• All program upgrades require 4/7 signers, and are subject to a 12 hour timelock

• All non-program upgrades require 6/10 signers

• All multisig transactions require at least 3 human verifications of the underlying txn construction

In addition to this, Fluid's architecture has a built-in circuit breaker via its automated borrow limits. These limits expand gradually to prevent the rapid draining of assets and are hard-capped at a maximum rate that can never be crossed.

We don't ask you to take our word for it. You can verify our audits and multisigs from our transparency dashboard here: https://t.co/545pIK0yXX

tweets.name: Solana
tweets.content:
Pods is expanding to @solana.

We’re excited to announce that Pods is integrating Solana DeFi strategies into our infrastructure, unlocking new ways for neobanks and fintechs to access onchain yield, capital-efficient products, and deeper stablecoin utility.

This is not only for teams already building on Solana.

It also means that neobanks operating on other chains will be able to tap into Solana’s growing financial ecosystem through Pods, without needing to rebuild their entire stack from scratch.

As more neobanks embrace stablecoins and DeFi as part of their backend, access to the right chains and the right strategies becomes a real competitive advantage.

Solana is one of the most important ecosystems shaping that future, and we’re excited to help bring its opportunities to more financial platforms.

More to come.

tweets.name: Solana
tweets.content:
March made one thing clear: peer-to-peer @solanapayments on @Solana are accelerating fast.

Here is what stood out in March:

→ Peer-to-peer (P2P) volume hit $192.8B (+24% MoM), a new monthly ATH. Transactions also crossed 11M (+23%). Both size and usage are scaling together (h/t @Dune)

→ Micropayments are hitting new highs. Over 5.8M transactions ($0.50 to $100) were processed, a new ATH, with volumes reaching their second highest level on record. Micro payments are not just active, they are scaling

→ Retail payments are also breaking out on Solana. Transfers ($100 to $1K) crossed $1B for the first time, with transactions climbing to a new peak. Stablecoins  on Solana are moving into everyday usage

→ Salary sized transfers ($1K to $20K) are also gaining momentum. They processed $3.7B, a 24% increase from the prior month while salary payment transactions surged 58% to a hit monthly record. Salary payouts are becoming more frequent

→ Larger flows are scaling alongside with business payments (>$20K) generating $187B, a new ATH. Transactions also increased, showing continued growth in large value settlement

→ New use cases for stablecoins are picking up too.
Prediction markets (by @JupiterExchange) did $7.6M (+87%) marking a fresh peak on prediction market volumes on @SolanaFloor

Other Developments: 

→ @WesternUnion partners with @crossmint
to launch USDPT stablecoin on Solana 

→ @SoFi enables native Solana network deposits  

→ @Noah_HQ adopts Solana for African payroll infrastructure

→ PYUSD (by @PayPal) expanded access to ~70 countries in mid-March
 
That's the recap for the month!

tweets.name: Vic TALK
tweets.content:
今天凌晨谷歌公布了最新的开源大模型——Gemma4。这是一个小体积但是高性能的开源模型，同时最高可以支持256k的上下文输入，这意味着后续可以处理各种复杂任务

纽约时报昨天报道了一间只有一个人的独角兽公司，Medvi是一家远程医疗GLP-1服务提供商，由41岁的Matthew Gallagher在洛杉矶的家中创立。他于2024年9月以2万美元启动，目前靠着ai的帮助和处理问题已经来到了营收15亿美金之上，这让大家对于ai后续能做的事情有了更多想象空间

Anthropic的最新科研论文显示，ai居然会有情绪产生。在向ai喂不同的关键词后，ai表示不同情绪的向量部分会被激活，这是不是代表着ai也有感情了？并不是冰冷的机器。

具体内容请看视频，感谢大家点赞支持！

tweets.name: 0xSun
tweets.content:
几乎每次出现STO这种妖币，我都会劝群友看看就好，别去碰。包括之前的RIVER、MMT、TRB等等，这种币本质上是信息不对等的博弈，庄家知道自己手里有多少筹码，知道合约OI有多少是自己的，有无数种方法玩弄对手盘，来实现利益最大化，可以控筹拉盘爆空，可以靠负费率磨死空军，可以建好空单砸现货断头台，也可以反反复复拉砸。

结果每次最被津津乐道的，往往要么是有人底部埋伏进去吃了几倍，要么是有人顶部摸顶空快速获利。其实也很正常，币圈的用户本身就风险偏好很高、喜欢波动、喜欢财富故事。我也相信有人是可以通过合约和链上的各种数据，在面对庄家盘的时候，将胜率提升到高于一般散户的水平。

但是归根结底，一场信息不对等的博弈，散户注定是-EV。体现在时间上，就是你可以对99次，但是只要1次错误加上扛单，结局就是归零。体现在资金面上，一个单机盘从始至终，获利的大概率是庄家加极小部分散户，买单的则是剩下的绝大部分人。

当猫不想和老鼠玩的时候，老鼠没有任何机会，不要心甘情愿去做一只老鼠。

tweets.name: 雨中狂睡SleepintheRain
tweets.content:
省流：挪了点 USD1 去 @reservoir_xyz @Morpho 合作的金库，池子在 Monad 上，当前 ~11.5% APY，资金还不太卷

传送门👇🏻https://t.co/DC3azUK9Xn

池子的策略比较干净，就是 Morpho 上常见的抵押物拿去放贷+循环贷吃息差，由 @SteakhouseFi 提供策略 rebalance 跟风控

敞口是 @reservoir_xyz 发行的 rUSD，也比较干净，不是乱七八糟的非足额抵押/债务形态的稳定币。rUSD 的储备有一篮子中心化发行的稳定币，包括 USDT USDC USD1 RLUSD PYUSD GHO，也可以通过 USDC/USDT/USD1 进行 1:1 铸造跟赎回

关于怎么看最近的 DeFi 跟链上收益，以及如何安全生产：
1️⃣ 在各路 CEX 补贴大战夹击之下，不靠 looping 上杠杆，链上基本已经没有收益空间了。资产发行方不愿意补贴，终端协议也不愿意补贴。可以挖积分的待 TGE 新项目在这个行情下也很难去将积分变现（要么取消 TGE 计划，要么开盘就被砸蒙）
2️⃣ 现实情况下肯定是把稳定币都归集到中心化交易所，并且玩中心化发行的稳定币（这里要大赞特赞 USD1，收大统领几个月的红包收麻了，USD1 仓位一直没撤过）
3️⃣ 不光收益提供方要做好风控。作为用户，力所能及的安全操作自己也要牢记：分仓，把鸡蛋分散一点放 ; 交易所账户使用合规的 KYC + 打开 2FA；链上尽量使用硬件钱包 + 每一个月清理一次合约授权
4️⃣ 不要贪，不要贪，不要贪！重要的事情说三遍。理财局是个风险和收益不对称的陷阱：你以为赚 10% 的年化很香，但真要出事起来本金是奔归零去的。
存之前看清楚几个点：
资产的形态（是足额抵押？超额抵押？抵押物是债务还是真美元？）
收益的来源（是补贴？looping？还是手续费收入？）
本金的流向（是只放着不动，还是会拿去放贷？还是拿去开了别的敞口？）
协议的背景（有无黑历史？团队背景、投资人阵容，是否秽土转生？出事了会不会赔付？）

祝各位安全生产，本金常在🫡
